text: Entering this space, I am captivated by its modern, almost clinical tranquility. The glass and bright lighting create an atmosphere of clarity, but also of distance. I am drawn toward the R+D wall, intrigued by the promise of human-machine coexistence. There is a sense of anticipation—a place alive with thought and invention, yet the silence makes me reflective, aware of my own curiosity and solitude among these expressions of collective intellect.
